hero.description: Built with love by Eddy & Patricia as their family home on the ocean's edge. Today, three sea-facing villas with a 120° sunset panorama — open to those seeking true tranquility. Rated 9.6 Exceptional on Booking.com.

estate.title: Not a Hotel.
estate.description: What began as a dream of a couple from Bandung and Germany in 2013 is now three ocean-facing villas — a place where guests are welcomed like family by Eddy, Patricia, their sons and their wonderful team. Not artificial luxury. Genuine warmth.
estate.amenitiesSubtitle: Small details that make every guest feel at home
estate.additionalNote: *Diving, snorkeling, and island tours available through our team — just ask.

facilities.seaSunsetViewDesc: Our guests' favorite spot for morning coffee, afternoon sunsets and dinner under the milky way.
facilities.cozyKitchenBarDesc: The heart of The Secret — a welcoming place where guests gather and enjoy friendly conversations with the family and the team.
facilities.privateGardenDesc: Your space to breath in the beautifully arranged hidden garden in midst of the jungle.
facilities.privateVerandaDesc: Step onto your secluded veranda - your place to pause, breathe and reconnect with nature.
facilities.sunriseBreakfastDesc: Homemade bread and jam with freshly ground coffee with an ocean view.
facilities.ecoConsciousDesc: Stay lightly on the island with the dedicated zero single-use plastic approach and effort to recycle and compost. Refill your water bottle and enjoy the local cuisine.
facilities.residentDogDesc: Our two dogs and our cat are part of our family. They will loudly welcome you and bark once in a while.
facilities.dailyHousekeepingDesc: Our housekeeping team ensures your villa is always clean and comfortable.

suites.title: Every Villa Has Its Story
suites.description: Cipaku, Birdsong, Tivoli Garden — each one was built for someone special. Now it's your turn.

cipaku.name: Cipaku
cipaku.description: Cipaku: The family's first villa — full kitchen, private veranda, and 100% privacy. Built for Patricia's parents, who once lived in the area 'Cipaku' in Bandung, now open for you.

birdsong.name: Birdsong
birdsong.description: Designed for the family's closest friends. The widest veranda and most spacious Villa at The Secret. 'Birdsong' is a name of a cute Cafe in the village Mukteshwar in the Indian Himalayas, where Eddy and Patricia loved to spend their holidays while they were living in India.

tivoliGarden.name: Tivoli Garden
tivoliGarden.bedDetails: Queen Bed (1.8m x 2m) + Double Bed (1.5m x 2m)
tivoliGarden.description: A villa with a hidden garden. Flexible for couples or small families. 'Tivoli Garden' was the name of the apartment where Eddy and Patricia were living in Manila, Philippines. They visited the original Tivoli Garden in Kopenhagen, Denmark, where they got married in 2017.

experience.title: Tropical Comfort
experience.titleAccent: Your Home in the Heart of Nature
experience.description: Homemade bread and jam for breakfast. Breathtaking views from the ocean-facing rooftop and your cozy verandas. A different sunset every day, right before your eyes.

all.title: The Full Story
all.description: Every corner has a story. From ocean-facing verandas to hidden gardens, This is soft luxury, surrounded by nature.

exteriors.title: Built with Love
exteriors.description: Where teak meets the tropics. Structures built by Eddy himself, blending seamlessly with the island landscape.

interiors.title: Like Your Own Home
interiors.description: Handcrafted wooden furniture, natural textures, and colors inspired by the Karimunjawa sea.

details.title: The Little Things
details.description: Homemade jam. Morning toast. Outdoor showers. True luxury is in what you touch.

night.title: After the Sun Goes Down
night.description: Warm lighting, ocean sounds, and a sky full of stars. Our rooftop is perfect for stargazing.

contact.title: We're Waiting
contact.description: Straight to us: no agents, no commissions. Like calling a friend's home. Patricia is ready to help you plan the perfect visit ahead of time, while Eddy will take care of you during your stay.

contact.whatsappServiceMessage: Hello, I would like to inquire about additional services for my stay at The Secret Karimunjawa.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.ctaText: Still have more questions? Our team is ready to assist you.
faq.ctaMessage: Hello, I would like to ask some questions regarding The Secret Karimunjawa.

reservation.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times at The Secret Karimunjawa?
reservation.a1: Check-in time is between 13:00 – 18:00 WIB. Guests are expected to inform us of their estimated arrival time in advance. Check-out time is between 06:00 – 10:00 WIB.
reservation.q2: What are the room rates at The Secret Karimunjawa?
reservation.a2: Our rates are dynamic and vary depending on the selected unit type and your stay dates (High/Low Season). Prices generally range from Rp 1,600,000 – Rp 2,000,000 per night. Please contact us to get the exact price for your preferred dates.
reservation.a3: On-site payments are generally in cash or via the application 'Wise'. For bookings via online platforms, credit cards can be used as a guarantee. Please contact us for more information regarding bank transfers.
reservation.q4: Can I book directly without using an OTA (Online Travel Agent)?
reservation.a4: Yes, absolutely! You can book directly via our WhatsApp with 0% commission. All transactions go 100% to the villa, allowing us to provide the best service for you.

facilities.q1: How many guests can stay in one unit?
facilities.a1: Villa Cipaku and Villa Birdsong are designed for 2 guests perfect for couples. Villa Tivoli Garden can host up to 4 guests and is perfect for small families.
facilities.q3: Does every unit have a balcony or terrace?
facilities.a3: Yes, every unit is equipped with a spacious private terrace or veranda, complete with Sea Views and Sunset Views.
facilities.q4: What facilities are available in the room?
facilities.a4_intro: Each unit is equipped with the following facilities:
facilities.q5: Are extra beds or baby cots available?
facilities.a5: We can provide extra beds for 250.000 IDR.

dining.q1: Does The Secret Karimunjawa have an on-site restaurant?
dining.a1: Yes, we have an exclusive restaurant only open to our in-house guests. We have several options for breakfast and lunch and provide a variety of traditional local dinner, which needs to be pre-booked until 3pm. All meals can easily be converted to be Vegetarian, Vegan, and dairy-free menus.
dining.a2: Our breakfast is special with six different options: 1) Homemade bread with handmade jam, eggs and veggies, 2) Pancake Tower, 3) Pink Smoothie Bowl, 4) Oatmeal Bowl, 5) Soto Ayam and 6) Nasi Goreng. Your breakfast can be served right on your veranda or on the rooftop.
dining.q3: Is a reservation required for dinner?
dining.a3: Yes, we recommend guests book dinner in advance (before 3pm) so our team can prepare the best dishes for you.

policies.a1: Yes, pets are allowed at The Secret Karimunjawa at no additional charge. Please confirm when booking so we can prepare a suitable unit.
policies.q2: Is smoking allowed in the rooms?
policies.a2: For the comfort of all guests, smoking is not permitted inside the rooms. Designated outdoor smoking areas are available.
policies.q3: What languages do the staff speak?
policies.a3: Our team communicates in Indonesian, English, and German.

location.q1: How far is The Secret from the city center and the beach?
location.a1: The Secret is the closest accommodation to the three main beaches of Karimunjawa! The nearest beaches (Batu Topeng, Sunset Beach and Tanjung Gelam) are just a 20-minute walk or 3 minutes by scooter.
location.q2: Is an airport shuttle service available?
location.a2: Yes, we provide shuttle services from the Karimunjawa airport and harbor. This service is non-complimentary (surcharge applies). Please contact us upon booking to arrange the pick-up schedule.
location.q3: What activities can be done during the stay?
location.a3_intro: Plenty of options around The Secret:
a3_items: Water Sports: Island Hopping, Snorkeling, Diving, Fishing, and Canoeing
Exploration: Hiking Mount Maming (3 hours), Stargazing through telescopes at 'Deepsky' Observatory
Beaches: Batu Topeng, Sunset and Tanjung Gelam Beach (20 min walk / 3 min by scooter), Alano & Anora Beach (15 min scooter)

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet our dedicated family who work hard every day to make your stay memorable. We treat every guest as part of our own family.

descriptions.abyan: From kitchen to guest connection, Mas Abyan crafts delicious moments with warmth — and a welcoming smile.
descriptions.anik: With a cheerful spirit and genuine love for her work, Mbak Anik takes care of both kitchen and housekeeping.
descriptions.dadang: Our trusted all-rounder, has a keen eye for detail. He brings life to our gardens and care to every corner of the property.
descriptions.bella: Our longest standing team member since 2021 is the heart of our home — now devoted to care for our family with her tireless energy and loving care.

reviews.text: 3 nights here was very satisfying, the four of us rented the Alang2 type room with 2 bedrooms, kitchen, private balcony. The hotel is very comfortable, clean, and neatly arranged. What makes us feel at home is the hospitality of the owner Mr. Kang Eddy who happened to be staying there, as well as Mas Egif who is always helpful. A hotel with a charming sunset view. Can't wait to go there again. Thank you The Secret Karimunjawa for making our vacation very memorable.
reviews.author: Dedup

reviews.text: From the service, cleanliness, toilets, breakfast menu and the main bedroom, it's amazing. I'm satisfied and my friend who I brought along was very satisfied, comfortable and the view is absolutely amazing.
reviews.author: Pak Pong

reviews.text: The nicest place we've ever visited, friends who haven't tried it please try this beautiful vacation spot.
reviews.author: Asyer Giandra

reviews.text: The last thing I said to the owners was that our stay in Karimunjawa would not have been the same without The Secret. The property is beautiful and welcoming, designed with a style that blends perfectly with the natural surroundings and respects the environment. Cleanliness and comfort are at the highest level. We were welcomed and taken care of very well, without lack of anything. If we return to Karimunjawa, we will definitely stay at The Secret.
reviews.author: Marcco Gatucci

reviews.text: This accommodation has stunning views and comes with everything you need! Impeccable cleanliness and professional and very friendly staff. Egif made sure we got everything we needed and accommodated all our needs. You can rent a scooter right from the property at an affordable price. I recommend it to everyone!
reviews.author: Mariana Cornicello

reviews.text: Very cute place with the amazing view. Harry was a great host, from the first moment. Welcomed us at the harbour, hooked is up with scooter, recommended beaches and warungs. Ika and Bella made amazing breakfast every morning. We had nasi goreng and traditional western breakfast every morning and it was great every day. Thank you so much.
reviews.author: FILIP STANOJEVIC

reviews.text: A little bit of paradise: the kindest staff, the best sunset, the tastiest breakfast we have found in Indonesia. Clean, spacious, beautiful, calm. Multi-talents Hari and Bella made us feel welcome and always made our eyes, stomachs and hearts happy. Owners Eddy and Patricia were so welcoming and made this little part of paradise feel like home to us. We were sad to leave and hope that life can give us the chance to come back again in the future.
reviews.author: Nina Schaap

reviews.text: Thank you for everything, Patricia, Eddie and Harry. We enjoyed the stay so much in the villa, with the nicest view, a coconut as welcome present and such a nice evening with you guys which really felt like an evening with friends. Thank you for building the crutch for me (I had a hiking accident), you guys are amazing! We will definitely come back - and stay even longer! Mini and Henrik
reviews.author: Henrik Willun

reviews.text: Thank you owners and mas Hari, me and my boyfriend enjoyed our stay in here. Thank you for the warm welcome. Room was really clean and we had a really nice breakfast there. They also have beautiful sea view right infront of our room and the rooftop! Everyone there was super helpful and caring it almost felt like we were part of their family haha! I will definitely stay here when i go to karimunjawa again! 🥰❤️
reviews.author: Vania

reviews.text: A bit of paradise: extremely friendly and personal approach, a solution to every question we had, the best sunset, ultra clean and spacious rooms and bathroom, wonderful breakfast, great staff. We left with tears in our eyes and will definitely be back to this wonderful guesthouse.
reviews.author: ProeverX

reviews.text: Had an amazing stay in this hotel! Good breakfast selection with a view. Great hospitality from a Egif, hatur nuhun pisan. Definitely gonna stay here again if I have a chance to visit Karimunjawa.
reviews.author: Tasya Syafira
